chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR CPNo.D-1621 0{ 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge For of main case. 21.12.2023 Petitioner is present in person M٢ Hussain Maitlo advocate for Respondents University Mr Asfand Yar Kharal AAG +++++٦٣+٦ Ieوو Learned Counsel for the Respondents/ University has filed schedule of payment whereby remaining outstanding amount would be paid to the Petitioner till 20 April 2024 Petitioner present in person is satisfied and seeks disposal of instant petition which is accordingly disposed of However default or non payment of said amount to the petitioner would ٤xD٥s٤ violator to the contempt proceedings hearing Niaz
